scripts.build:tlmcmddb: tlmcmddb-cli bundle --component-name AOBC --pretty database/TLM_DB/calced_data database/CMD_DB tlmcmddb.json
scripts.run-real:kble: bash -c 'while :; do kble -s <(jrsonnet connection.jsonnet -V=WIN_ADDR -V=COM_PORT); sleep 1; done'
scripts.run-sils:kble: bash -c 'while :; do kble -s <(jrsonnet connection-sils.jsonnet); sleep 1; done'
